title: Colorful Campfire Smoke
body:
Colorful Campfire Smoke

Think normal campfire smoke is boring? Wanted a cheaper beacon to mark locations in your world?
With Colorful Campfire Smoke installed, a campfire receiving redstone power will output colored smoke particles depending on the block below it.

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/URkCdfxP3vn41HPfif/giphy.gif "")
![](https://media.giphy.com/media/Zb6K7II7EVOkSbbzAx/giphy.gif "")
